overview: A smart vehicle rental and booking system where users can browse available vehicles, book by dates, manage reservations, and admins can manage the fleet and bookings.
features: Vehicle catalog with search and filters by type, price, and category
Date-based availability search for pickup and dropoff
Booking flow with auto-confirmation and unique reference number
User dashboard showing upcoming and past rentals with cancellation option
Admin dashboard to manage fleet, view all bookings, set pricing and availability
Internet Identity login for secure user authentication
Fully responsive design for mobile, tablet, and desktop
